title: Fasanerieallee
summary: Fasanerieallee is an allée in Tiergarten in Berlin, Germany. It is primarily known for the many sculptures from the Wilhelmine period. Fasanerieallee is connected to Großer Stern.
text:
Fasanerieallee is an allée in Tiergarten in Berlin, Germany. It is primarily known for the many sculptures from the Wilhelmine period. Fasanerieallee is connected to Großer Stern.

Sculpture
